title: The Remittances of Foreign Exchange and Investment in Foreign Exchange Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1991
full_text: The Remittances of Foreign Exchange and Investment in Foreign Exchange Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1991 विदेशी मुद्रा प्रेषण और विदेशी मुद्रा बंधपत्रों में विनिधान (उन्‍मुक्‍ति और छूट) अधिनियम, 1991 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1991-41 Act Number: 41 Enactment Date: 1991-09-18 Act Year: 1991 Short Title: The Remittances of Foreign Exchange and Investment in Foreign Exchange Bonds (Immunities and Exemptions) Act, 1991 Hindi Title: विदेशी मुद्रा प्रेषण और विदेशी मुद्रा बंधपत्रों में विनिधान (उन्‍मुक्‍ति और छूट) अधिनियम, 1991 Long Title: An Act to provide for certain immunities to persons receiving remittances in foregin exchange and to persons owning the Foreign Exchange Bonds and for certain exemptions from direct taxes in relation to such remittances and bonds and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Foreign Exchange Bonds not to be taken into account in certain cases.
